verses.text: The feast of trumpets is a holy day of blowing. Trumpets. A holy day is kept.
The feast of trumpets is a holy day of blowing. Trumpets. A holy day is kept.

Its offerings are brought to God. Offerings. The day is honoured with sacrifice.

The day of atonement, with affliction and offerings. Atonement. The nation is cleansed.

The feast of tabernacles begins with many offerings. Tabernacles. The great feast opens.

These are offered besides the vows and freewill gifts. Besides. Set worship and free gifts together.
